violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. A packaged whole raw meat cut was stored on the same tray as tubes of raw ground beef in the right stainless steel cooler in the kitchen.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. The smoker was not placed under a hood system.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The top of the chest freezer by the door to the kitchen is being held together with tape.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The side of the white freezer by the fryers needs to be cleaned. The white shelves by the front door to the kitchen need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system over the cooking equipment needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls and floors under and behind the cooking equipment need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken, cracked, and missing floor tile in the kitchen and dish area.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Maybe screen in the window for the screen door to the kitchen is broken and is no longer properly sealing.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Wooden shelf above the three compartment sink is missing laminate and swelled, no longer a cleanable surface. The chest freezer by the door to the kitchen has a broken life with tape holding it up.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Smoker was not under a hood system.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The white freezer by the fryers needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls behind the cooking equipment needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Broken/cracked/missing floor tile in the dish area and kitchen.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
